project.name: Calcie
project.description: Personal AI assistant with voice input/output, local LLM (Ollama), and memory system

initial_state.action: User pulled mistral model via Ollama
initial_state.phase_1_status: Complete - Core loop in jarvis.py with Ollama integration

code_changes: Added speech_recognition import with graceful fallback
Error handling for unknown audio, request errors, timeout, mic issues
Updated print_banner() to show voice status
Modified main loop: voice first, text fallback

next_steps: Phase 3: Voice output (TTS) - pyttsx3 or edge-tts
Phase 5: Tools - Web search + app launcher

updates: Renamed project from Jarvis to Calcie
SYSTEM_PROMPT changed to CALCIE persona (warm, friendly companion, concise responses)
Phase 3 Complete: Added voice output with pyttsx3

code_changes: Added speak() method to Calcie class

latency_optimizations.note: Main latency is Ollama + Mistral inference (hardware/model dependent)

updates: Phase 4 Complete: Migrated history to SQLite db and permanent facts to JSON.
Rewrote Wake Word logic to use true background daemon thread to prevent dropping audio frames.
Added 'Enter to wake' manual override via stdin queue threading.
Strict hallucination filters placed on SYSTEM_PROMPT to combat faux memories.
Emoji regex filter added before TTS to prevent vocalizing icons (e.g. 'flexed biceps').
Configured LLM settings to run with external models (user currently testing gemma4).

known_issues: Voice input requires PyAudio (macOS: brew install portaudio)
Google STT has free tier limits
Ollama assumes a running model on localhost:11434

commands.fix_pyaudio_macos: brew install portaudio && pip install speechrecognition pyaudio

in_app.Enter: Instantly start voice recording without wake word

wake_word_detection.description: True background threading listener that never drops audio frames.
wake_word_detection.implementation: listen_in_background daemon coupled with threading Queue checks for max responsiveness.
wake_word_detection.fallback: Push Enter on an empty line to instantly activate.

web_search.description: Searches web for current events, news, facts
